initial_program:
% Determine the maximum row and column indices (the walls are value 2, the fill colour is 3)
maxRow(MR) :- MR = #max{R : input(R,_,_)}.
maxCol(MC) :- MC = #max{C : input(_,C,_)}.

% Adjacent cells (4neighbourhood)
delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).
adjacent(R0,C0,R,C) :- delta(DR,DC), R = R0+DR, C = C0+DC.

% Cells reachable from the border through cells that are NOT a wall (value 2)
border_reachable(R,C) :- R = 0,          input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- R = MR, maxRow(MR), input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- C = 0,          input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- C = MC, maxCol(MC), input(R,C,V), V != 2.

reachable(R,C) :- border_reachable(R,C).
reachable(R,C) :- reachable(R0,C0), adjacent(R0,C0,R,C), input(R,C,V), V != 2.

% Interior holes  zeros that cannot be reached from the border
interiorZeros(R,C) :- input(R,C,0), not reachable(R,C).

% Wall cells that belong to a component which encloses at least one interior zero
wall_adjacent_inter(R,C) :- interiorZeros(Ir,Jc), input(R,C,w), w = 2, adjacent(R,C,Ir,Jc).
wall_enclosed(R,C) :- wall_adjacent_inter(R,C).
wall_enclosed(R,C) :- wall_enclosed(R0,C0), adjacent(R0,C0,R,C), input(R,C,w), w = 2.

% Determine the colour of every cell
output(R,C,Actual) :- interiorZeros(R,C), Actual = 3.
output(R,C,Actual) :- wall_enclosed(R,C),   Actual = 0.
output(R,C,Actual) :- input(R,C,V), not interiorZeros(R,C), not wall_enclosed(R,C), Actual = V.

% Exactly one colour per cell
output_cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,_).

1 { output(R,C,Actual) : color(Actual) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

rounds.program_after:
% Determine the maximum row and column indices (the walls are value 2, the fill colour is 3)
maxRow(MR) :- MR = #max{R : input(R,_,_)}.
maxCol(MC) :- MC = #max{C : input(_,C,_)}.

% Adjacent cells (4neighbourhood)
delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).
adjacent(R0,C0,R,C) :- delta(DR,DC), R = R0+DR, C = C0+DC.

% Cells reachable from the border through cells that are NOT a wall (value 2)
border_reachable(R,C) :- R = 0,          input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- R = MR, maxRow(MR), input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- C = 0,          input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- C = MC, maxCol(MC), input(R,C,V), V != 2.

reachable(R,C) :- border_reachable(R,C).
reachable(R,C) :- reachable(R0,C0), adjacent(R0,C0,R,C), input(R,C,V), V != 2.

% Interior holes  zeros that cannot be reached from the border
interiorZeros(R,C) :- input(R,C,0), not reachable(R,C).

% Wall cells that belong to a component which encloses at least one interior zero
wall_adjacent_inter(R,C) :- interiorZeros(Ir,Jc), input(R,C,w), w = 2, adjacent(R,C,Ir,Jc).
wall_enclosed(R,C) :- wall_adjacent_inter(R,C).
wall_enclosed(R,C) :- wall_enclosed(R0,C0), adjacent(R0,C0,R,C), input(R,C,w), w = 2.

% Determine the colour of every cell
output(R,C,Actual) :- interiorZeros(R,C), Actual = 3.
output(R,C,Actual) :- wall_enclosed(R,C),   Actual = 0.
output(R,C,Actual) :- input(R,C,V), not interiorZeros(R,C), not wall_enclosed(R,C), Actual = V.

% Exactly one colour per cell
output_cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,_).

1 { output(R,C,Actual) : color(Actual) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

final_program:
% Determine the maximum row and column indices (the walls are value 2, the fill colour is 3)
maxRow(MR) :- MR = #max{R : input(R,_,_)}.
maxCol(MC) :- MC = #max{C : input(_,C,_)}.

% Adjacent cells (4neighbourhood)
delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).
adjacent(R0,C0,R,C) :- delta(DR,DC), R = R0+DR, C = C0+DC.

% Cells reachable from the border through cells that are NOT a wall (value 2)
border_reachable(R,C) :- R = 0,          input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- R = MR, maxRow(MR), input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- C = 0,          input(R,C,V), V != 2.
border_reachable(R,C) :- C = MC, maxCol(MC), input(R,C,V), V != 2.

reachable(R,C) :- border_reachable(R,C).
reachable(R,C) :- reachable(R0,C0), adjacent(R0,C0,R,C), input(R,C,V), V != 2.

% Interior holes  zeros that cannot be reached from the border
interiorZeros(R,C) :- input(R,C,0), not reachable(R,C).

% Wall cells that belong to a component which encloses at least one interior zero
wall_adjacent_inter(R,C) :- interiorZeros(Ir,Jc), input(R,C,w), w = 2, adjacent(R,C,Ir,Jc).
wall_enclosed(R,C) :- wall_adjacent_inter(R,C).
wall_enclosed(R,C) :- wall_enclosed(R0,C0), adjacent(R0,C0,R,C), input(R,C,w), w = 2.

% Determine the colour of every cell
output(R,C,Actual) :- interiorZeros(R,C), Actual = 3.
output(R,C,Actual) :- wall_enclosed(R,C),   Actual = 0.
output(R,C,Actual) :- input(R,C,V), not interiorZeros(R,C), not wall_enclosed(R,C), Actual = V.

% Exactly one colour per cell
output_cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,_).

1 { output(R,C,Actual) : color(Actual) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).
